title: BehaviorLens
subtitle: Ziaza Zohnak le Bawmhnak
loading_hint: Module cu CDN in a load. A zulh ahcun, na internet connection en hmasa.
hub.title: BehaviorLens
hub.subtitle: Functional Behavior Assessment, ABC data lakhnak, le Behavior Intervention Plan hmanmi thil.
hub.select_student_first: Tuanvo thawk awkah a chunglei i sianginn pakhat thim
hub.abc_desc: Antecedent, ziaza, le consequence zohnak ttial
hub.obs_desc: Real-time interval, frequency, asiloah duration ttialnak
hub.analysis_desc: AI thawng in ziaza pattern analysis le forhfialnak
hub.overview_desc: Ziaza siatsuah, chart, le summary statistics
hub.freq_desc: A rang tein tally le minute kha rate ttialnak
hub.interval_desc: Tlawmpal, dihlak, asiloah caan tawi sample grid
hub.token_desc: Lentecelh khawhmi token he visual reinforcement board
hub.hotspot_desc: Routine chungah ziaza tampi a cang caan i hmuh
hub.export_desc: ABC data le zohnak kha JSON asiloah text in download
hub.record_desc: IEP/evaluation kha AI in summary tuah awkah belh
hub.hypothesis_desc: AI siamnak he visual A→B→C→Function flow chart
hub.goals_desc: AI siammi SMART ziaza goal le hmasawnh ttialnak
hub.contract_desc: AI in siammi sianginn-saya ziaza ttialnak
hub.cycle_desc: Phase 7 escalation cycle le intervention strategy
hub.reinforcer_desc: Category 5 chungah a tlamtling reinforcer hmuh
hub.choice_desc: Sianginn caah amah le amah cohlannak visual thimnak card
hub.audit_desc: Classroom khawhmun caah item 8 checklist le AI forhfialnak
hub.triangulation_desc: Data hmun 3+ kha cross-reference in convergence i tlawmpal
hub.impact_desc: Ziaza frequency, duration, le kum kha man kha bia in chimh
hub.traffic_desc: Sianginn caah sen/eng/hring ziaza zone poster
hub.datasheet_desc: Print khawhmi frequency, duration, ABC, asiloah latency data sheet
hub.homenote_desc: AI in siammi nu le pa biaruahnak le tone thimnak
hub.fidelity_desc: AI in siammi nifate BIP implementation checklist
hub.feasibility_desc: Bia 5 contextual fit assessment le AI forhfialnak
hub.gas_desc: AI in siammi descriptor he Goal Attainment Scaling
hub.pocket_desc: Clipboard chiah khawh awkah index-card BIP summary tawi
hub.abagraph_desc: Phase line, trend line, le visual analysis he publication-standard chart
hub.abaguide_desc: Tlawl khawhmi glossary, reinforcement schedule, decision tree le palh hmanhmanmi
hub.antecedentmod_desc: Ziaza a thawk hlanah hrem awkah AI thawng in khawhmun thlennak forhfialnak
hub.bcbahandoff_desc: BCBA caah data dashboard + consultation caah print khawhmi handoff packet
hub.casestudy_desc: Phase 4 clinical ruahnak le scoring he AI in siammi case study
hub.condprob_desc: ABC hypothesis kha data he tlangcelh awkah foreground vs background probability analysis
hub.counseling_desc: Counseling practice caah sianginn persona he AI role-play
hub.cultural_desc: Cultural humility lens in ziaza i hngalhfiah hlan tuah awkah dingdin-thup-ruah checklist bia 8
hub.drstrategy_desc: A tlamtling differential reinforcement strategy thim (DRA, DRI, DRO, DRL)
hub.effectsize_desc: Visual phase tlangcelh he intervention tuanvo zat awkah Tau-U, NAP, le PND ruah
hub.fbaworkflow_desc: FBA, BIP, le RTI behavior tier caah AI coaching he khuk-tein workflow
hub.fcttemplate_desc: Modality thimnak he Functional Communication Training plan tuahnak
hub.gamify_desc: Streak, badge, quest, le ruahnak journal he sianginn caah mood tracker
hub.glossary_desc: ABA bia 25+ tlawl khawhmi le a fiang biafang le real-world tahchunh
hub.homelog_desc: Nifate bia in nu le pa caah a fawi ziaza ttialnak
hub.iepgoals_desc: AI in siammi tu present level, SMART goal, objective, accommodation, le hmasawnnak monitoring plan
hub.iepprep_desc: Data summary, talking point, le a hnu-lei step he AI in siammi meeting timhtuahnak packet
hub.intervention_desc: Te khawhmi goal le milestone he AI in siammi week-tampi intervention plan
hub.latency_desc: Mean, median, le range statistic he stimulus-to-response caan tahnak
hub.maintenance_desc: Mastery hnuah skill retention le hmun, mi, le thildanglam chungah generalization tracking
hub.mtss_desc: Multi-tiered support a uktu caah AI thawng tier placement forhfialnak he tier 3 visual pyramid
hub.pdpath_desc: ABA skill khuk-tein siamhnak caah khuk-tein onboarding module
hub.progress_desc: Ziaza data tampi in IEP-ready hmasawnnak monitoring catlangbu
hub.progressreport_desc: Data summary, trend analysis, goal hmasawnnak, le nu le pa caah a fawi bia thimnak he AI in siammi hmasawnnak report
hub.qualitycheck_desc: AI thawng na ABC entry hngalhfiahnak le a tlamtling tha tuahnak tuihralhnak
hub.reframe_desc: AI nih deficit-based description kha asset-focused, thazaang-based bia in a ttial than
hub.replacebehavior_desc: Concern ziaza kha functionally equivalent replacement le cawnpiaknak strategy chungah map
hub.restorative_desc: Harm repair, community circle, le reintegration conference caah khuk-tein script
hub.sandbox_desc: PD, pre-service cawnpiaknak, asiloah sianginn taktak lo in ABA cawn awkah simulated student data load
hub.scdmanager_desc: AB, ABAB, Multiple Baseline, Alternating Treatment, Changing Criterion
hub.sessiontracker_desc: Rate calculation he khuk-tein session-based ziaza tahnak
hub.taskanalysis_desc: Forward, backward, asiloah total-task chaining le prompt tracking he skill kha cawn khawhmi step ah tlaai
hub.teamnotes_desc: Saya, para, counselor, le nu le pa caah timestamp he role tampi collaboration thread
hub.trends_desc: Intensity trend, hmun frequency, le ni/caan heatmap a langhtermi SVG chart
hub.bipgen_desc: Na data in Behavior Intervention Plan siam.
hub.cantdowontdo_title: Tuah Khawh Lo / Tuah Duh Lo
hub.cantdowontdo_desc: A tlamtling bawmhnak thim awkah skill vs. performance deficit thlennak.
hub.competingpathways_desc: Buainak lampi he a duhmi le replacement ziaza kha map.
hub.functionquiz_desc: Tuanbia tawi in ziaza function hngalh awkah practice.
hub.mipractice_desc: Simulated sianginn lehnak he MI biaruahnak rehearse.
hub.practicum_desc: A thawk in donghnak tiang khuk-tein practice case run.
hub.replacementbehavior_desc: Sianginn herhnak a hlanmi same-function ziaza hmuh.
abc.title: ABC Data Lakhnak
